calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Nuris for petitioner John Sprachis.

The Court stated that he had concerns with the actions of the estate administrator and counsel, as there were inappropriate incidences of distributions made and actions taken without court approval. He noted, however, that the accounts had been straightened out and that no objections had been raised. Mr. Nuris apologized to the Court, stating that as this was a matter within his own family he had not given the matter his usual level of oversight. He stated that both he as counsel and the estate administrator had wiaved fees. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy John Boncato. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Continued To Dec-15-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Nuris for (petitioner) John Spachis.

The Court stated that it understood that Mr. Nuris was working on filing an amendment. Mr. Nuris reported that they filed a declaration on Friday (11/6/15), that they did not have the verification in, that they have e-filing receipts and confirmed what had been filed. The Court checked the register of actions and confirmed that a proof of service had not been filed, stated that the court has nothing to show that the petition was served, that it will continue the matter to have time to review the documents filed on Friday and that it will need to be able to confirm service. The accounting petition was continued to December 15, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-22-2015 Continued To Nov-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Nuris for John Spachis.

Mr. Nuris stated that he needs a continuance of 30-45 days, that they hope to have the bank documents by next month, that they will then amend the petition and that matters were delayed due to the death of the executor and appointment of a new executor. The accounting petition was continued to November 10, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-27-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Nuris for Marina Taylor.

Mr. Nuris stated that he is filing a petition for final distribution today. Status on filing of the petition for final distribution was taken off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-15-2014 Continued To Oct-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Nuris for John Spachis.

Mr. Nuris requested a 30 to 45-day continuance to file his petition for final distribution. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration was continued to October 27, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
